A website as dynamic as the people behind it,a-website-as-dynamic-as-the-people-behind-it,68e588b7c96f13e39379d98d,68e2be176459e98837a31ee1,690a853a2d9fc0bcd65edbda,false,false,Tue Nov 04 2025 22:59:06 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:26:37 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:29:25 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),1,Nimble Gravity Website,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/6910b283c1295e0499633a80_Nimble-Gravity.avif,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/6910b283c1295e0499633a80_Nimble-Gravity.jpg,https://player.vimeo.com/progressive_redirect/playback/1135063571/rendition/540p/file.mp4%20%28540p%29.mp4?loc=external&log_user=0&signature=0bce3bfa829c36d088a79e93b9cef5ff45c6c23bd912a2f03d80fa9919f649e6,case-study,nimble-gravity,,"Finance, Data & AI Consultancy",,,,web-design-2
column5:
ux-copywriting,,"How a B2B data consultancy moved from corporate and forgettable to a digital presence that actually reflected the ambitious, curious team behind it.","

Nimble Gravity transformed itself beyond the generic corporate look and feel to showcase its unique values, personality and culture that defines its team. The new website delivers a digital presence as dynamic as the company itself.

","

01. Overview

Nimble Gravity helps visionary companies scale smarter through data and artificial intelligence. But its website told a quieter story. For a team defined by innovation, adventure and curiosity, their digital presence looked like everyone else’s, safe, static and
column6:
corporate.

We redesigned and developed a fully interactive website that reflected who they truly are: a company driven by strategic excellence and creativity within the corporate realms. The result was a digital experience that felt alive, mirroring the energy and personality of the dynamic people behind
column7:
it.

‍

02. Challenge

Nimble Gravity had the expertise but needed guidance in bringing out their unique culture, values and expression. The thing that made them different, was their unique advantage. Their existing website failed to communicate the spirit of experimentation and ingenuity that defined the company’s culture. In a market crowded with predictable B2B aesthetics, they needed a web experience that could both inform and inspire without losing clarity or credibility within the corporate
column8:
market.

‍

03. Strategy

We approached the project with a simple premise: design and build a website that behaves like the people it represents. Through strategic discovery sessions, we mapped out Nimble Gravity’s core attributes, strategic execution, human curiosity, and creative agility and translated them into interactive behaviors. The site would no longer just present company content. It would perform
column9:
it.

‍

What We Did:

  • UX Strategy
  • Information Architecture
  • Design System Development
  • High-fidelity prototype

‍

04. Creative Concept

Structured Motion

The creative direction balanced control with flow. Structured Motion became the design philosophy, a system where movement mirrored thought and art direction and animation conveyed the companies innovation. Every transition, hover, and scroll interaction was crafted to express the brand’s mindset. Visual and typographic rhythm replaced static design conventions, allowing the interface to breathe with the same confidence as the team.

‍

What We Did:

  • Art Direction
  • Motion Design
  • UX Copywriting 

‍

05. Applications

The new website was built as a modular and interactive environment. Dynamic panels, responsive data visuals, and kinetic micro-interactions brought the user journey to life. Each page served a dual function, communicating technical depth while showcasing cultural authenticity and credibility. The site became an active expression of Nimble Gravity’s expertise, accessible across devices and adaptable for growth.

‍

What We Did:

  • Web Design and Development
  • Interactive Components
  • Motion Graphics and Animation

‍

06. Outcome

The collaboration gave Nimble Gravity a distinct digital presence that finally matched their ambition. The new website transformed perception from another VC data consultancy to a distinct, technology-driven strategic partner. The experience captured their personality and culture with focus, giving them a digital platform built to scale as dynamically as the company itself.   

","

column1: Bringing contemporary energy to a legacy brand,bringing-contemporary-energy-to-a-legacy-brand,68e588b7c96f13e39379d98d,68e2be176459e98837a31ee1,68ed0bbb25b9f21ced622155,false,false,Mon Oct 13 2025 14:24:59 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:27:41 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:29:25 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),5,LIFT Labs Rebrand,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/6938c5402776d16075f96764_lift-labs.avif,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/68f74071565f18b4b95bcd97_Liftlabs-thumbnail-static-16x9.jpg,,locked,comcast-nbc-universal-lift-labs,comcast-nbc-universal-lift-labs,Tech & Innovation,,,,brand-identity
column3:
creative-direction,,How a startup accelerator buried inside a media giant got a brand as bold as the founders it backs.,"

Comcast NBCUniversal’s brand LIFT Labs needed a new brand identity that matched its mission to accelerate innovation and reflect its young entrepreneurial energy. The refreshed system bridges startup momentum with enterprise legacy, creating a unified brand system built to scale.

","

01. Overview 

LIFT Labs partners with early-stage startups that are shaping the future of enterprise innovation. The program connects founders with the scale, mentorship, and reach of a global media and technology leader. Yet its brand identity had fallen out of sync with that ambition, visually dated and inconsistent across all brand touch points.
We reimagined LIFT Labs’ brand identity. The goal was to modernize the visual identity, to speak to diverse founders, and build a unified design system that could evolve within Comcast’s legacy framework without losing credibility or recognition.   

‍

02. Challenge

LIFT Labs needed to communicate innovation without detaching to far from its parent brand. The existing system lacked cohesion and failed to reflect the energy of the startups it supported. The challenge was twofold: bring contemporary relevance to a legacy brand while creating a flexible structure that internal teams could easily manage and sustain.   

‍

03. Strategy

We started by clarifying LIFT Labs’ position within Comcast NBCUniversal. Where startup speed meets enterprise scale. The strategy focused on creating distinction through simplicity: a design language that signalled innovation while echoing the authority of the parent brand. Through workshops and audits, we identified color, form, and motion as the key levers to express momentum, inclusion, and trust.

‍
What We Did:

  • Brand Strategy
  • Creative Direction

‍

04. Creative Concept

Modern Legacy

The creative idea connected heritage wth sophisticated evolution. Inspired by Comcast’s iconic Peacock feathers, we developed a design system that introduced a signature purple. An anchor color symbolizing creativity and progression, woven through a refined typographic and motion framework. The new identity expressed movement and optimism while maintaining visual continuity with the broader Comcast brand language.

‍
What We Did:

  • Brand Identity
  • Motion System
  • Design System

‍

05. Applications

The new brand system translated seamlessly across all platforms, digital, social, and internal communication. We delivered a comprehensive brand book and modular templates that gave the LIFT Labs team freedom to build consistent assets quickly while preserving strategic integrity. Each design tool was crafted to encourage autonomy without diluting brand equity.

‍

What We Did:

  • Comprehensive Brand Guidelines
  • Social Media Template System 

‍

06. Outcome

LIFT Labs emerged with a cohesive, future-ready identity that reflected the innovation it champions. The refreshed system balanced modern energy with the trust of a legacy brand. Empowering internal teams to maintain consistency and creative control. Years later, the identity continues to serve as the foundation of their communications and startup outreach.

","

‍

"

column1: Transforming presence into cultural belonging,transforming-presence-into-cultural-belonging,68e588b7c96f13e39379d98d,68e2be176459e98837a31ee1,68ed0bbb25b9f21ced622161,false,false,Mon Oct 13 2025 14:24:59 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:26:02 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:29:25 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),2,Verizon HBCU Tour,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/690d186ce5a71d86c57ee150_thumb.avif,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ed9/690d14b8b7c2812b05f880e0_thumbnail.avif,https://player.vimeo.com/progressive_redirect/playback/1134392513/rendition/540p/file.mp4%20%28540p%29.mp4?loc=external&log_user=0&signature=8ae703ff31619551630bdd73268c9e5b615d62ab736d007d682e810130902621,case-study,verizon,revolt,Telecom & Media Network,,,,campaign-identity
column6:
creative-direction,,How culture-first AR turned Verizon's HBCU sponsorship into sold-out events across 3 cities and a genuine connection with 2M fans.,"

Verizon set out to build genuine connection with Black Gen Z audiences. Partnering with REVOLT. Back In Session came to life, an HBCU tour designed to turn awareness into participation. The result: Multi-city sold-out events, thousands in student signups, and a foundation of first-party data to power future engagement.

","

01. Overview

Verizon sought to deepen its connection with young Black audiences. As the brand expanded its its community initiatives, it identified historically Black Colleges and Universities as vital cultural hubs shaping the next generation of culture. Verizon partnered with REVOLT to launch “Back In Session” an HBCU tour celebrating student life, creativity, and connection. By Default joined as creative partner to design and deliver the experience across three key markets: Atlanta, Houston, and Washington, DC.

‍

02. Challenge

Verizon had reach but needed resonance. The brand’s traditional campaigns connected through scale, not intimacy. To engage Gen Z at HBCUs, Verizon required a presence that mirrored the culture rather than observing it. An initiative that empowered expression and participation.

‍

03. Creative Concept

Back In Session

The idea celebrated return, the return to campus, to community, to self. Back In Session transformed Verizon’s presence into a vibrant living campus experience, amplifying the music, lifestyle, and creative energy of HBCUs. The concept invited participation, positioning Verizon as a facilitator of connection rather than a sponsor of events.

‍

What We Did:

  • Campaign Strategy
  • Creative Development
  • Brand Identity
  • Motion Design &
column7:
Graphics

04. Applications

From Tour to TouchpointThe campaign drew from the visual and cultural language of HBCU life. Verizon’s palette was reimagined through the vibrancy of school colors and marching-band illustration. Typography balanced clarity with energy, blending nostalgia and modernity across every touchpoint. From interactive ticketing platforms and influencer kits to event signage, AR filters, and digital experiences, each element reinforced cultural belonging. Live performances and motion design brought the tour to life. Transforming venues into celebrations of community. The campaign sold out in every city and generated thousands of signups, establishing a scalable model for future Verizon engagement.

‍

What We Did:

  • Web Design &
column8:
Development
  • AR Development
  • Brand Guidelines
  • Campaign Materials

    • 05. Outcome

    The collaboration created more than a marketing activation. It built a cultural bridge between brand and new-gen audience. Turning awareness into participation and participation into trust. Collecting first-party data and an authentic connection to sustain relationships with the next generation of Black creators, innovators and storytellers.

    ","

Turning value into everyday play,turning-value-into-everyday-play,68e588b7c96f13e39379d98d,68e2be176459e98837a31ee1,68ed0bbb25b9f21ced62215d,false,false,Mon Oct 13 2025 14:24:59 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:27:06 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),Thu Apr 09 2026 16:29:25 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time),4,McDonald's Mini Game,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/692cb426efe4078016ddf928_thumb_mcdonalds.avif,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e2be176459e98837a31ee6/68f740575fc534157dead754_McDonalds-thumbnail-static-16x9.jpg,,locked,mcdonalds,revolt,Food & Beverage ,,,,campaign-identity
column7:
ux-copywriting,,"How a gamified card game turned a promotional campaign into culture, 3.3M impressions, played and shared by Black Gen Z audiences nationwide.","

McDonalds value reimagined through playful audience participation and discovery. Partnering with REVOLT to engage the young Black audience. We built an interactive mini card game and editorial that connected culture, lifestyle and self-expression. Result: drove over 3.5million impressions.

","

01. Overview

McDonald’s is all in on serving up moments that bring people together. Partnering with REVOLT, the brand set out to boost awareness for its McValue campaign. Educating audiences on what McValue truly means and positioning McDonald’s as a go-to for morning meals, not just late-night cravings. Together, we built a community-first, gamified experience that turned a promotion into a shared moment of participation and enjoyment.  
‍

02. Challenge

The McValue campaign needed to move beyond a standard promotion. The objective was to show that value extends to lifestyle, choice, and everyday relevance. At the same time strengthen its connection with Black Gen Z audiences through experiences that reflected their true culture, interests and everyday hustle. We set out to make education feel like entertainment while staying true to audience and brand identity.

‍

03. Creative Concept

Framed Moments

Framed Moments creative drew from the everyday lives and interests of Black Gen Z. Linking lifestyle, humor, and hustle through collectible snapshots, personalized quizzes, everyday wins and cultural style cues that mirrored how this audience sees themselves. At the center was Discover McDonald’s McValue Quiz, an interactive memory card game that guided users to their ideal McValue combo. The experience integrated menus, sound cues, and scoreboards to create a sense of discovery and self-expression.

‍

What We Did:

  • Creative Strategy
  • Visual Identity
  • UX Experience Design
  • Creative Direction

‍

04. Applications

‍

The experience lived across digital editorial, gamified content, and social storytelling. Users played, shared, and compared results that aligned with their personality and lifestyle. By Default directed the creative production, UX flow, and social extensions to ensure a cohesive experience that felt intuitive and rewarding.

‍

 What We Did:

  • Interactive Editorial
  • Game Strategy
  • UI/UX Development
  • Social Media Toolkit

‍

05. Outcome

Through participation, McDonald’s deepened its resonance within community culture and demonstrated how play can drive both understanding and engagement. It invited Black Gen Z audiences to see themselves in the brand. Connecting cultural relevance with everyday choices.The campaign generated over whopping 3.3 million plus impressions and became a reference for how cultural insight, digital brand storytelling can amplify awareness.

‍

","

‍

"
